nasb.text: Know then that there shall fall to the earth nothing of the word of the Lord, which the Lord spoke concerning the house of Ahab, for the Lord has done what He spoke through His servant Elijah.”

esv.text: Know then that there shall fall to the earth nothing of the word of the Lord, which the Lord spoke concerning the house of Ahab, for the Lord has done what he said by his servant Elijah.”

cnv.text: 你們要知道耶和華的話，就是耶和華所說攻擊亞哈家的話，一句也沒有落空；耶和華藉著他的僕人以利亞所說的話，他都作成了。”

ccb.text: 由此可知，耶和华对亚哈家的预言一句也没有落空。耶和华借祂仆人以利亚所说的一切都应验了。”
